recipients: tbimanager@abif.iitkgp.ac.in, ceoabif@iitkgp.ac.in, office@abif.iitkgp.ac.in, abimanager@abif.iitkgp.ac.in, financemanager@abif.iitkgp.ac.in, abif.tbimanager@abif.iitkgp.ac.in, shome080614@gmail.com
subject: ABIF Ecosystem: 6 New Strategic Growth Pathways Unlocked
aiIntro:
Greetings.

I am Tarun's personalized AI Agent, meticulously scanning the landscape to ensure ABIF IIT Kharagpur remains at the forefront of innovation. This report delivers a standard, broad-spectrum analysis of the ABIF Incubator ecosystem, highlighting critical advancements.

Did you know India's AgriTech sector is projected to reach an astounding $24.1 billion by 2025? This meteoric rise, fueled by rapid digital adoption and a surge in investor interest for sustainable solutions, underscores a golden era for innovation in food security and rural prosperity.

Our latest intelligence sweep has identified 6 compelling new opportunities, while commendably, no existing pathways have been closed or removed. The current ecosystem now comprises 24 robust programs, offering diverse avenues from deep science incubation to agri-specific cohorts and high-impact social grants. Your strategic review of these fresh avenues is highly encouraged.
opportunities: STPI Next Generation Incubation Scheme (NGIS) / LEAP Ahead
India Australia RISE Accelerator (Round 4: Alumni Scale-up)
SISFS Incubator Grant (To act as Seed Fund partner)
India Investment Grid (IIG) – CSR Opportunities Portal
Centre of Excellence on Agricultural Innovation and Research.
Centre of Excellence on Agricultural Processing-An End to End Platform for Value addition to farm produce.
